Load reference datasets from Zenodo cache

Source: R/load_reference.R
load_reference.Rd

Downloads one or more reference datasets from the package Zenodo record and caches them locally. Subsequent calls with the same datasets and dest_dir return the cached files without re-downloading unless overwrite = TRUE.

load_reference(
  datasets = NULL,
  source = c("tabula", "hpa"),
  dest_dir = xEnrich_cache_dir(),
  overwrite = FALSE,
  verify = TRUE
)

Arguments

datasets

Character vector of dataset names to load. If NULL or empty, all available datasets for source are downloaded. Use the manifest accessor functions to list available names.

source

Character. "tabula" or "hpa".

dest_dir

Character. Local cache directory. Defaults to the platform-appropriate user cache via tools::R_user_dir().

overwrite

Logical. Re-download even if a local copy exists. Default FALSE.

verify

Logical. Verify SHA256 checksum after download. Default TRUE. Disable only for debugging.Corrupt downloads will silently propagate if verification is off.

Value

A named list of loaded R objects, one per requested dataset.

Contents

Developed by Artur Shvetcov.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
